subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! The Sun of bounty shineth resplendent and the Ocean of generosity surgeth forth - the former ever-radiant throughout all time, and the latter in all ages flowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله شمس کرم مشرق و بحر جود موجود ان در کل احیان در اشراق و این در کل اوان
